post.description: FBO ID + password; user must have ``hashed_password`` set (see migrations / admin tooling).

Reload the signed-in user from the database and re-issue JWT cookies.

Use after profile changes or admin edits so ``fbo_id``, ``username``, ``role``, and
``email`` claims match ``users`` without waiting for access-token expiry.

intelligence.title: Intelligence
intelligence.description: When false, hide Work → Intelligence nav. Not a third-party AI integration flag.

ClientFeatures.title: ClientFeatures
ClientFeatures.description: Feature toggles the SPA should read once and cache (single source vs hardcoded UI).

DownlineExecutionStatsOut.title: DownlineExecutionStatsOut
DownlineExecutionStatsOut.description: Map assignee user_id → aggregates + bottleneck tags.

lead_name.title: Lead Name
lead_name.description: Parent lead name at read time

due_at.title: Due At
due_at.description: Omit to leave unchanged; null clears due date

completed.title: Completed
completed.description: True = mark done now; False = reopen

href.title: Href
href.description: Dashboard path segment, e.g. work/follow-ups — client prefixes /dashboard/

LeadDetailPublic.title: LeadDetailPublic
LeadDetailPublic.description: Extended lead detail — same fields as LeadPublic (all included).

archived.title: Archived
archived.description: True = archive now (sets archived_at); False = restore (clears archived_at)

in_pool.title: In Pool
in_pool.description: Admin only: release to shared pool (true) or remove from pool without assigning (false)

restored.title: Restored
restored.description: Admin only: true = undo soft-delete (clears deleted_at)

whatsapp_sent.title: Whatsapp Sent
whatsapp_sent.description: True = set whatsapp_sent_at to now; False = clear it

day1_completed.title: Day1 Completed
day1_completed.description: True = set day1_completed_at to now; False = clear it

day2_completed.title: Day2 Completed
day2_completed.description: True = set day2_completed_at to now; False = clear it

day3_completed.title: Day3 Completed
day3_completed.description: True = set day3_completed_at to now; False = clear it

LoginRequest.title: LoginRequest

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: DB user id when JWT sub is numeric

fbo_id.title: Fbo Id
fbo_id.description: Unique FBO ID (primary directory / login identifier)

email.title: Email
email.description: User email from JWT when present

display_name.title: Display Name
display_name.description: Display label (legacy session display_name / users.name); derived from username or email local-part

auth_version.title: Auth Version
auth_version.description: JWT claim ver — same idea as legacy AUTH_SESSION_VERSION

MeResponse.title: MeResponse
MeResponse.description: Current session — populated from cookie JWT when present.

environment.title: Environment
environment.description: From APP_ENV — for badges, support, client logging.

auth_dev_login_enabled.title: Auth Dev Login Enabled
auth_dev_login_enabled.description: When true, SPA may show dev quick-login UI; production should be false.

Role.title: Role
Role.description: Stored in ``users.role`` and JWT ``role`` claim — values are stable API strings.
